title: Claude Models Overview
description: Master the Claude model family tiers and the decision chain that turns them into production features.

title: Chain Of Thought Prompting
description: Zero-shot chain-of-thought is a technique that dramatically improves LLM reasoning on complex tasks by asking the model to think step-by-step, and understanding when and how to apply it separates expert practitioners from beginners.

lessons.title: Start Skill
lessons.audioSummary: Zero-shot chain-of-thought is a technique that dramatically improves LLM reasoning on complex tasks by asking the model to think step-by-step, and understanding when and how to apply it separates expert practitioners from beginners.

lessons.title: Few-Shot Chain-of-Thought
lessons.audioSummary: Few-shot chain-of-thought is a technique that improves LLM accuracy by showing the model examples of step-by-step reasoning before asking it to solve a new problem.

lessons.title: Self-Consistency Sampling
lessons.audioSummary: Self-consistency sampling improves LLM accuracy by generating multiple reasoning paths and selecting the most common answer, transforming a single uncertain response into a more reliable one.

lessons.title: Least-to-Most Prompting
lessons.audioSummary: Least-to-most prompting is a technique for breaking down complex problems into manageable steps to dramatically improve LLM accuracy on reasoning tasks.

lessons.title: Scratchpad and Hidden Reasoning
lessons.audioSummary: Learn scratchpad and hidden reasoning—a chain-of-thought technique that improves LLM accuracy on complex tasks by letting the model work through problems step-by-step.

lessons.title: When CoT Hurts More Than Helps
lessons.audioSummary: Learn when chain-of-thought prompting actually hurts performance and how to decide if it's worth the added cost and complexity for your use case.

title: Few Shot Learning

lessons.title: Start Skill

lessons.title: Example Ordering Effects

lessons.title: Dynamic Few-Shot Retrieval
lessons.audioSummary: Dynamic few-shot retrieval teaches LLMs new tasks by showing a few carefully selected examples instead of fine-tuning, and mastering this technique separates expert AI engineers from beginners.

lessons.title: Balancing Class Distribution
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to balance class distribution in few-shot learning by showing LLMs diverse examples across all categories, dramatically improving model performance with just a few well-chosen prompts.

lessons.title: Using Negative Examples
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to use negative examples in few-shot prompting to teach language models new tasks with just a handful of examples instead of expensive fine-tuning.

lessons.title: How Many Examples Is Enough

title: Nvidia H100

lessons.title: Transformer Engine and FP8
lessons.audioSummary: FP8 and Transformer Engine on NVIDIA H100 let you run large AI models faster and cheaper by using lower precision arithmetic strategically, but only when you've measured the bottleneck first.

lessons.title: NVLink and NVSwitch on H100
lessons.audioSummary: NVLink and NVSwitch on H100 are critical interconnect technologies that determine whether your GPU cluster runs efficiently or sits idle, and understanding their mechanics prevents costly performance cliffs at scale.

title: Pytorch Mastery
description: Learn PyTorch fundamentals: tensors, modules, automatic differentiation, and the design patterns that power 80% of production AI systems.

lessons.title: PyTorch Fundamentals
lessons.audioSummary: Learn PyTorch fundamentals: tensors, modules, automatic differentiation, and the design patterns that power 80% of production AI systems.

lessons.title: Autograd Deep Dive
lessons.audioSummary: Autograd is PyTorch's automatic differentiation engine that computes gradients for backpropagation, and mastering its mechanics and design patterns is essential for productive deep learning development.

lessons.title: nn.Module Patterns
lessons.audioSummary: Learn nn.Module patterns in PyTorch: the design patterns and best practices that separate productive workflows from constant friction.

lessons.title: DataLoader Pipelines
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to design and implement efficient DataLoader pipelines in PyTorch, understanding the mechanics behind data loading, batching, and optimization rather than just following API defaults.

lessons.title: torch.compile and Inductor
lessons.audioSummary: torch.compile and Inductor are PyTorch optimization tools that can double your model's speed, but only when your use case genuinely fits PyTorch's design philosophy and you commit to its idioms.

lessons.title: PyTorch in Production
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to deploy PyTorch models in production by understanding framework idioms, making deliberate design choices, and following proven patterns that experienced engineers use to ship reliable AI systems.

title: Tensorflow Keras3
description: TensorFlow and Keras 3 is a powerful, multi-backend deep learning framework that rewards deliberate design choices and working with the framework's idioms rather than against them.

lessons.title: TensorFlow / Keras 3 Overview
lessons.audioSummary: TensorFlow and Keras 3 is a powerful, multi-backend deep learning framework that rewards deliberate design choices and working with the framework's idioms rather than against them.

lessons.title: Functional API vs Subclassing
lessons.audioSummary: Learn when to use Keras functional API versus subclassing, and how to choose the right approach for your deep learning project.

lessons.title: tf.data Pipelines
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how tf.data pipelines optimize data loading and preprocessing in TensorFlow by chaining operations like shuffling, batching, and prefetching to keep your GPU fed with data.

lessons.title: tf.function and Graph Mode

title: Jax Mastery
description: JAX is a high-performance numerical computing library that combines NumPy's familiar syntax with automatic differentiation and compiled performance through XLA, and mastering its fundamentals means understanding when and how to use its core features like JIT compilation, automatic gradients, and vectorization.

lessons.title: JAX Fundamentals
lessons.audioSummary: JAX is a high-performance numerical computing library that combines NumPy's familiar syntax with automatic differentiation and compiled performance through XLA, and mastering its fundamentals means understanding when and how to use its core features like JIT compilation, automatic gradients, and vectorization.

lessons.title: jit, grad, vmap
lessons.audioSummary: Master JAX's three core transformations—jit for compilation, grad for automatic differentiation, and vmap for vectorization—to write fast, scalable machine learning code.

lessons.title: pmap and shard_map
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how pmap and shard_map distribute computations across multiple devices in JAX for data parallelism and efficient scaling.

lessons.title: JAX Pytrees
lessons.audioSummary: JAX Pytrees are a core abstraction that lets you work with nested data structures efficiently in JAX, and mastering them early prevents friction throughout your projects.

lessons.title: Functional Randomness
lessons.audioSummary: Functional randomness in JAX is a design philosophy that treats randomness as a pure function, enabling reproducibility and composability in machine learning workflows.

lessons.title: JAX vs PyTorch
lessons.audioSummary: Learn when and how to choose between JAX and PyTorch by understanding each framework's design philosophy and production trade-offs.

title: Flax Jax
description: Flax is JAX's most popular neural network library, and mastering its design philosophy and idioms means shipping faster and avoiding constant friction with your tools.

lessons.title: Flax Overview
lessons.audioSummary: Flax is JAX's most popular neural network library, and mastering its design philosophy and idioms means shipping faster and avoiding constant friction with your tools.

lessons.title: Flax NNX
lessons.audioSummary: Flax NNX is JAX's modern neural network API that prioritizes developer productivity through a deliberate design philosophy, and choosing to work with rather than against a framework's idioms is what separates fast shipping from constant friction.

lessons.title: Flax Linen
lessons.audioSummary: Flax Linen is a legacy API for building neural networks with JAX that requires thoughtful design decisions and framework-aligned patterns to use productively in real systems.

lessons.title: Training Loops with Flax
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to build effective training loops in Flax using the modern NNX API, understanding the design patterns and mental models that separate productive frameworks use from constant friction.

lessons.title: Checkpointing in Flax
lessons.audioSummary: Learn why checkpointing in Flax matters for production neural networks, how to implement it correctly, and when to actually use it versus simpler alternatives.

lessons.title: Porting PyTorch to Flax
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to port PyTorch models to Flax by understanding JAX's design philosophy and mastering the NNX API for building, training, and deploying neural networks.

title: Equinox Jax
description: Equinox is a JAX framework for building PyTorch-style neural networks with full pytree compatibility, designed around clean patterns for research and production code.

lessons.title: Equinox Overview
lessons.audioSummary: Equinox is a JAX framework for building PyTorch-style neural networks with full pytree compatibility, designed around clean patterns for research and production code.

lessons.title: Equinox Modules
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to structure neural networks in JAX using Equinox modules, a PyTorch-like approach that respects JAX's pytree design.

lessons.title: Filtered JIT and Vmap
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how filtered JIT and vmap work in Equinox to efficiently compile and vectorize neural network training code while maintaining clean, readable JAX patterns.

lessons.title: Equinox vs Flax
lessons.audioSummary: Learn when and how to choose between Equinox and Flax for JAX deep learning, focusing on design philosophy and production patterns rather than framework mechanics.

lessons.title: Stateful Layers in Equinox
lessons.audioSummary: Stateful layers in Equinox let you build neural networks in JAX with clean, modular code by treating state deliberately as a design choice rather than a default.

lessons.title: Equinox for Research
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to use Equinox for research by understanding its design philosophy, leveraging PyTorch-style neural networks in JAX, and applying proven patterns that accelerate development.
